name: Depth Anything V2
author: Guillaume
description: Full depth-based 3D reconstruction pipeline using Depth Anything V2. Converts an image to a mesh via depth estimation, point cloud back-projection, and Poisson surface reconstruction.

params_schema.label: Model Variant
params_schema.tooltip: Larger variants produce sharper depth maps at the cost of speed and VRAM.

params_schema.label: Device
params_schema.tooltip: Select compute device. Auto-detect uses GPU when available.

params_schema.label: Focal Length (px)
params_schema.tooltip: Estimated focal length for point cloud back-projection. Higher values compress depth range.

params_schema.label: Poisson Depth
params_schema.tooltip: Octree depth for Poisson surface reconstruction. Higher = more detail but slower.

params_schema.label: Max Faces
params_schema.tooltip: Target face count after simplification. Set to -1 to disable.
